description: A long-time customer with no claims is eligible for a loyalty credit on their policy renewal.

nodes.task_description: As part of the renewal process, identify that the customer is eligible for a loyalty discount.

expected_outcome.value: The system flags the policy as eligible for the credit.

nodes.task_description: Apply the loyalty credit to the renewal premium.

expected_outcome.value: The system automatically reduces the renewal premium by the discount amount.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the renewal documents clearly show the credit that was applied.

expected_outcome.value: The generated renewal offer clearly itemizes the loyalty credit.
